content.speakerText: What’s the status of the product launch timeline?
content.speakerTextCn: 产品发布的时间表进展如何？
expectedAnswers: We’re on schedule—beta testing finished two days early, and marketing materials are 90% complete.
Slightly delayed by vendor delays, but we’ve adjusted the timeline and still aim for the original launch date.
Everything’s on track. We’ve completed all internal milestones ahead of plan.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确汇报时间表状态（准时、延迟、提前）
语言准确性：是否使用正确时态和时间表达（on schedule, ahead of plan, adjusted timeline）
表达自然度：是否使用符合职场语境的流畅表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 timeline, on schedule, delayed, milestone, launch 等关键词
